actionClockPauseBehavior.description: When section-6's easter-egg overlay is visible (mounted), section-5's action-clock visual must reflect is_paused=true. Section-5 reads handDocument.action_clock.is_paused (written by section-4 in concert with the easter_egg field) and renders the paused state. Section-6 does NOT directly mutate section-5's clock — both react to the same server signal.

overlayZIndex.notes: section-5's UI uses z-index <= 1000; section-6's overlay uses z-index 9999 to guarantee it sits above everything in section-5. Any future section-5 z-index increase must coordinate with section-6 (Sev 2a).

notes: This is the only direct section-5-to-section-6 coordination needed; everything else flows through the server-written handDocument.
